### 🚨 PEP Alert: Muhammad Farooq Hasnain (COO)

> **Pakistan Air Force** | 2006–2023 | 17 years service | Now COO, Topsun Group

- Self-described: "joined Pakistan Air Force in 2006 and left in 2023 for assuming role of COO"
- 16 years management experience in PAF → likely achieved Squadron Leader/Wing Commander rank
- **FATF Recommendation 12**: Senior officials of armed forces = PEPs
- Still within **12–18 month former-PEP EDD window** (left 2023)
- No adverse findings related to PAF service
- **Action required**: Confirm rank at separation; source of funds/wealth analysis

### 🏭 Manufacturing Legitimacy — Verified

> **KFUEIT University Industrial Tour** (Khwaja Fareed University of Engineering & Information Technology, HEC-accredited)
>
> "The Institute of Biological Sciences recently organized an industrial tour for the students of Biotechnology to Topsun Chemicals Pakistan, a renowned Agro chemical company. The students along with the faculty members of IBS explored the facility and gain hands-on experience in the industry. During the visit, the students were briefed about the company's operations, products, and services. They also had the opportunity to visit the **Quality Control (QC) lab and production unit**..."

A shield was formally presented to **the COO (Farooq Hasnain)** by the university.
